name: pensive
description: Deterministic memory system for AI-assisted coding sessions

scripts.help:
echo '
pensive workflow:
  1. npm run build          — compile TypeScript
  2. npm link               — install pensive CLI globally
  3. cd <your-repo>         — go to any git repo
  4. pensive init    — initialize memory for that repo
  5. pensive status  — check project info
  6. pensive explore — open Kuzu graph explorer (requires Docker)
  7. pensive context — show current context bundle
'
